title: City Manager

rationales.taskAutomation: Budget oversight, personnel decisions, council relations, and public accountability define the role and rest on judgment and relationships AI cannot replace.
rationales.toolMaturity: Budget-analytics and reporting-dashboard tools are useful but generic; nothing purpose-built for municipal executive leadership has real traction.
rationales.adoption: Municipal government is one of the slowest sectors to change executive workflows, and most cities still run budget and reporting processes manually.
rationales.agenticExposure: Cross-department coordination and public accountability require human authority and relationships that autonomous agents cannot hold.

salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 11-1011 (closest detailed occupation), adjusted toward ICMA municipal-manager survey data

defenseSkills.skill: Council relations and public communication skills

insight: An executive role where AI helps with reporting mechanics but not the accountability and relationship work that defines the job.
